title: Recording rental income made simple
summaryBody: Recording rental income made be simple and scalable with FreeAgent for Landlords

detailBlocks.text: **Property-specific chart of accounts. **Use bank feeds and AI data extraction alongside a dedicated chart of accounts to create consistent, high-speed workflows. **Automate your property ownership splits. **Allocate income and costs across owners once to set a permanent rhythm. All ledgers flow automatically in relation to the ownership splits. **Multiple owners via one licence. **All the landlords within a property portfolio can file MTD from a single licence. And there are no limits to the number of properties for all landlords.
